summary: A workout tracking app that allows users to load and track their workout progression, performance, and metrics
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Energetic workout hero background with abstract fitness elements (hero-fitness.dim_1200x600.png)
- Minimalist dumbbell icon for workout entry section (dumbbell-icon.dim_128x128.png)

existing_features.title: Create a workout entry form that allows users to input exercise name, sets, reps, weight, duration, and optional notes
Build a workout history view that displays all logged workouts in reverse chronological order with date, exercise, and key metrics
Implement a progression visualization that shows performance trends over time for each exercise, displaying improvements in weight, reps, or volume

Design a creative and coherent visual theme with a fitness-inspired aesthetic, using energetic colors, bold typography, and motivational design elements that remain consistent throughout the application

new_feature_requests.summary: Create a backend data model to store workout sessions with fields for date, exercise name, sets, reps, weight, duration, and notes
Implement backend functions to add new workout sessions and retrieve workout history
